title: Heather Rand
content:
{{Character |image = Heather Rand.png |real name = Heather Rand |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |DOB = [[1968|March 8, 1968]][http://www.zacharyzirlin.com/iron-fist/hl14k2gwamr2adw3bpekpmvm6cejfn Heather Rand's Date of Birth] |DOD = [[2001|Late 2001]]{{Ref|IF101}}{{Ref|IF103}}[[:File:New York Bulletin Joy and Ward Meachum Special Report|New York Bulletin | Joy and Ward Meachum Special Report]] |tv series = ''[[Iron Fist (TV series)|Iron Fist]]'' (3 episodes)
''[[The Defenders]]'' (mentioned) |web series = ''[[New York Bulletin/Promotional Campaign|New York Bulletin]]'' (picture; 1 video) |actor = [[Victoria Haynes]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|She made you hold her hand as you crossed the street. You pulled away from her as though you didn't need her.|[[Madame Gao]] to [[Danny Rand]]|The Defenders (episode)}} '''Heather Rand''' was the wife of [[Wendell Rand]] and the mother of [[Danny Rand]]. ==Biography== ===Rand Enterprises=== Heather met and married a man named [[Wendell Rand]], who owned a company called [[Rand Enterprises]] with [[Harold Meachum]]. They soon had a son named [[Danny Rand]], who often played with [[Joy Meachum|Joy]] an [[Ward Meachum]]. One day, Heather and Wendell returned home and found the kids playing {{WPS|Monopoly}}. Ward claimed that Danny had been a problem. While on the [[Rand Enterprises Private Jet]], the Rand family suddenly felt turbulence. Wendell told Heather to stay in her seat, but instead she went over to Danny and said she loved him and they would keep him safe. Suddenly, the roof split open, causing Heather to get thrown out into the air, killing her.{{Ref|IF101}} ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Wendell Rand]] † - Husband *[[Danny Rand]] - Son ===Allies=== *[[Ward Meachum]] *[[Joy Meachum]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Harold Meachum]] † - Former Friend and Killer *[[Hand]] **[[Madame Gao]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" width="100%" !
